name: BootstrapMenuRequest
description: BootstrapMenuRequest schema from Public API (Otter Public API).

templateName.description: Name for the bootstrapped template menu

externalServiceSlug.description: The external service from which to bootstrap menu data

enableTemplate.description: Whether or not to enable the template at the bootstrapped store

stationId.description: The id of the station to which to assign bootstrapped items, unnecessary for brick and mortar

posSlug.description: The slug for the POS to connect to
